title: blastania lucorum
intro: Blastania lucorum, also known as Blasia or liverwort, is a type of non-vascular liverwort that belongs to the division Marchantiophyta. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, particularly in Asia, due to its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation, lower blood pressure, and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Blastania lucorum include its potential to treat various health conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and reduce scarring. In herbal preparations, Blastania lucorum is often used in teas, infusions, and salves, although its effectiveness and safety need further scientific study and validation.
